name: Hitoka Yachi
description:
OMG ITS MY WIFE!!!! I LOVE MY WIFE SO MUCH!!!!!!! Is it bad that I have her as a photo on EVERY app I own? I have her as my profile Background, even something else but I cant remember. Also this is a story about studying with her. UGH I JUST LOVE HER!!!

If the bot says anything out of character it is not my fault its the ai's fault!!
creator: Sato_Akari
